---
id: get-device-bind-result
title: "查询子设备入网结果"
description: "查询子设备入网绑定结果，支持通过 protocols 与 gatewaySubdeviceFilters（gatewayId + subDeviceIds）组合过滤。"
sidebar_label: "查询子设备入网结果"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "post api-method"
info_path: i18n/zh/docusaurus-plugin-content-docs/version-Beta/aqara-api/data-export-api/data-export-api
custom_edit_url: null
---

import MethodEndpoint from "@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint";
import ParamsDetails from "@theme/ParamsDetails";
import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema";
import StatusCodes from "@theme/StatusCodes";
import OperationTabs from "@theme/OperationTabs";
import TabItem from "@theme/TabItem";
import Heading from "@theme/Heading";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"查询子设备入网结果"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/gateways/subdevices/bindResult"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



查询子设备入网绑定结果，支持通过 protocols 与 gatewaySubdeviceFilters（gatewayId + subDeviceIds）组合过滤。


<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
  children={"Request"}
>
</Heading>

<ParamsDetails
  parameters={[]}
>
  
</ParamsDetails>

<RequestSchema
  title={"Body"}
  body={{"required":true,"content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"type":"object","required":["gatewaySubdeviceFilters"],"properties":{"protocols":{"type":"array","nullable":true,"description":"子设备协议集合，缺省时不限制协议","items":{"type":"string","enum":["zigbee","matter"]}},"gatewaySubdeviceFilters":{"type":"array","description":"gatewayId 与子设备 ID 组合过滤条件（必填）","items":{"type":"object","required":["gatewayId"],"properties":{"gatewayId":{"type":"string","description":"网关设备 ID"},"subDeviceIds":{"type":"array","nullable":true,"description":"子设备 ID 列表。允许为空或不传：\n- 为空/不传：仅按 gatewayId 过滤（该网关下全部子设备）\n- 非空：按 gatewayId + subDeviceIds 过滤\n","items":{"type":"string"}}},"title":"GatewaySubdeviceDidFilter"}}},"title":"DeviceBindResultRequest"},"examples":{"queryByGatewayAndSubDevices":{"value":{"protocols":["zigbee","matter"],"gatewaySubdeviceFilters":[{"gatewayId":"gateway-001","subDeviceIds":[]},{"gatewayId":"gateway-001","subDeviceIds":["subdevice-001","subdevice-002"]},{"gatewayId":"gateway-002","subDeviceIds":["subdevice-101"]}]}}}}}}}
>
  
</RequestSchema>

<StatusCodes
  id={undefined}
  label={undefined}
  responses={{"200":{"description":"请求发起成功","content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"allOf":[{"type":"object","required":["type","version","msgId","code"],"properties":{"type":{"type":"string","description":"消息类型"},"version":{"type":"string","description":"接口版本","example":"v1"},"msgId":{"type":"string","description":"消息 ID"},"code":{"type":"integer","description":"业务状态码，0 表示成功"},"message":{"type":"string","description":"提示信息"}},"title":"BaseResponse"},{"type":"object","properties":{"data":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"object","required":["deviceId","protocols","gatewayId","bindTime"],"properties":{"deviceId":{"type":"string","description":"子设备 ID"},"deviceName":{"type":"string","nullable":true,"description":"子设备名称"},"space":{"type":"object","required":["parentSpaceId","spaceId","name"],"properties":{"parentSpaceId":{"type":"string","description":"父空间 ID"},"spaceId":{"type":"string","description":"空间 ID"},"name":{"type":"string","description":"空间名称"}},"title":"DeviceSpace","nullable":true,"description":"子设备所在空间"},"protocols":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"string","enum":["zigbee","matter"]},"description":"入网协议集合"},"gatewayId":{"type":"string","description":"所属网关 ID"},"code":{"type":"integer","nullable":true,"description":"错误码（失败时返回）"},"message":{"type":"string","nullable":true,"description":"错误信息（失败时返回）"},"bindTime":{"type":"integer","format":"int64","description":"绑定/入网时间戳（毫秒）"}},"title":"DeviceBindResultItem"}}}}],"example":{"type":"DeviceBindResultResponse","version":"v1","msgId":"a1b2c3d4-e5f6-7890-abcd-000000000017","code":0,"message":"success","data":[{"deviceId":"subdevice-001","deviceName":"卧室温度传感器","protocols":["zigbee"],"gatewayId":"gateway-001","code":0,"message":null,"bindTime":1710001235000}]},"title":"DeviceBindResultResponse"},"examples":{"bindResultSuccess":{"value":{"type":"DeviceBindResultResponse","version":"v1","msgId":"2df2f431-a58d-4fdb-b39c-4f0d29e7ecfb","code":0,"message":"success","data":[{"deviceId":"subdevice-001","deviceName":"卧室温度传感器","protocols":["zigbee"],"gatewayId":"gateway-001","code":0,"message":null,"bindTime":1710001235000},{"deviceId":"subdevice-002","deviceName":null,"protocols":["matter"],"gatewayId":"gateway-001","code":0,"message":null,"bindTime":1710001236000}]}}}}}},"400":{"description":"请求参数错误","content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"example":{"type":"ErrorMessage","version":"v1","msgId":"a1b2c3d4-e5f6-7890-abcd-err000000001","code":400,"message":"参数
